title: Clint Dean
compiled_truth: Clint Dean is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-04-27 to 2001-12-07), Clint Dean sent 85 and received 680 emails, totalling 765 interactions. Top correspondents: [Tstraws](people/tstraws-qwest) (11), [Dgagliardi](people/dgagliardi-reliantenergy) (10), [Craig Dean](people/craig-dean-ey) (8), [Llmaser](people/llmaser-degeurinrealty) (8), [Doug Gilbert-Smith](people/doug-gilbert-smith) (7).
